address: Tambon Mak Khaeng, Amphoe Muang, Udon Thani 41000

description.en: Beautiful city lake park in the center of Udon Thani with illuminated fountains, food stalls lining the perimeter, jogging paths, and weekend live mor lam music performances on a lake stage.
description.nl: Prachtig stadsmeerpark in het centrum van Udon Thani met verlichte fonteinen, etensstalletjes langs de rand, jogpaden en weekend live mor lam muziekoptredens op een podium aan het meer.

metaTitle.en: Nong Prajak Park - Top Attraction in Udon Thani | Go2Thailand
metaTitle.nl: Nong Prajak Park - Top Attractie in Udon Thani | Go2Thailand

metaDescription.en: Discover Nong Prajak Park in Udon Thani. Beautiful lake park with illuminated fountains, food stalls and live music.
